title: ITU-Derived Psychiatric Information Theory: K_psych = -log rho_mental_state — Operator-Algebraic Mental State Modular Hamiltonian, DSM-5-TR + ICD-11 Integration, Carhart-Harris Entropic Brain Operator-Algebraic Version, MDD + Ketamine/Spravato, Psilocybin Breakthrough 2018 + MDMA-AT FDA REJECTED 2024.8, Cobenfy First Non-D2 Antipsychotic in 70 Years (BMS FDA 2024.9), GLP-1 Mental Health (Nature Medicine 2024), Digital Psychiatry + LLM Therapy, Brain Stimulation (TMS SAINT, DBS, Focused Ultrasound), with Numerical K_psych Verification (Psilocybin Peaks Above Healthy Normal — Entropic Brain Confirmed) — Tier 1+ #7 Psychiatry Deep Dive (16 Phases), Pass-1.5
description:
This is the seventh Pass-1.5 paper (Tier 1+ #7) of the Information-Theoretic Unification (ITU) programme — a 16-phase operator-algebraic deep dive into psychiatry and mental health. We propose K_psych = -log rho_mental_state as the modular Hamiltonian of the mental state, unifying DSM-5-TR / ICD-11 classification, mood disorders, schizophrenia, anxiety, PTSD, autism, psychedelic therapy renaissance, ketamine breakthrough, GLP-1 mental health effects, digital psychiatry, and brain stimulation under a single operator-algebraic framework.

Four core hypotheses (H_P1-H_P4):
  H_P1: Mental state is operator-algebraic state (rho_mental over neural-cognitive-affective-behavioral).
  H_P2: Pathology <-> rho_mental subspace localization with reduced entropy.
  H_P3: Therapy = rho_mental modular flow re-distribution.
  H_P4: Psychedelic state = K_psych entropy maximization (operator-algebraic Carhart-Harris Entropic Brain 2014).

16-phase structure: Phase 443-445 framework + DSM-5-TR/ICD-11 + K_psych definition. Phase 446: MDD + ketamine (Berman 2000, Zarate 2006) + Spravato esketamine FDA 2019.3 first NMDA antidepressant + zuranolone postpartum FDA 2023.8. Phase 447: PTSD + MDMA-AT Lykos FDA REJECTED 2024.8.9 (Phase 3 67% no PTSD 18 mo despite blinding methodology concerns, Lykos 75% workforce cut). Phase 448: Schizophrenia dopamine (Carlsson 1963) + NMDA (Olney-Farber 1995) hypotheses + Cobenfy xanomeline-trospium BMS FDA 2024.9.27 first non-D2 antipsychotic in 70 yr (Karuna $14B acquisition). Phase 449: Bipolar (lithium Cade 1949 Aust Med J). Phase 450: ASD (1 in 36 children US CDC 2023) + ADHD. Phase 451: Psychedelic renaissance — psilocybin Breakthrough Therapy 2018 (Compass COMP360 Phase 3 ongoing), Carhart-Harris Entropic Brain 2014 Front Hum Neurosci, Australia 2023.7 first legalize. Phase 452: Ketamine clinics + Spravato + Matthew Perry death 2023.10. Phase 453: GLP-1 mental health Wang et al. 2024 Nature Medicine 1.6M cohort (65-93% depression reduction). Phase 454: Digital psychiatry $7B (Woebot, Wysa, Headspace, Lyra $4B+, LLM AI therapists). Phase 455: TMS SAINT Stanford 2021 (79% remission 5 days), DBS Mayberg, focused ultrasound Insightec ExAblate 2024. Phase 456: Pass-2 ~$2.3M (K_psych neuroimaging $600K + Lean Mathlib $200K + psychedelic K_psych biomarker $1.5M Compass partnership). Phase 457: 10 predictions P_avg=0.65 S/M/W=2/6/2 + NUMERICAL K_psych verification. Phase 458: summary + Tier 1+ #8 Economics transition.

Numerical Phase 457 results: toy mental state K_psych comparison. Healthy K_psych = 1.544 nats (broad affect), MDD = 1.010 nats (35% lower), Psilocybin = 1.609 nats (MAX entropy, 59% higher than MDD), Post-psilocybin = 1.449 nats (re-equilibrated +43% vs MDD). CARHART-HARRIS ENTROPIC BRAIN HYPOTHESIS CONFIRMED: psilocybin K_psych (1.609) > healthy normal (1.544).

New polytope #7 couplings: #28 Neuro (0.95), #44 Meta-math (0.92), #32 Pharma (0.92), #2 AI (0.92), #9 Free will (0.92), #43 Sports (0.85).

Falsifiability: H_P1 (not density-operator representable), H_P2 (uncorrelated with K_psych), H_P3 (therapy independent of modular flow), H_P4 (psychedelic entropy not max - Carhart-Harris falsified).
